description: Real icon assets (v1.6.0). Replace ALL emoji icons with self-hosted Google Material Symbols (Outlined, Apache-2.0), bundled offline (no CDN, like the Roboto font), themed via currentColor so they render correctly across all 8 era x mode theme combos. CURRENT STATE: the icon system is entirely emoji — the .icon-* classes in style.css are `::before { content: '<emoji>' }` (icon-play=▶, icon-delete=🗑, icon-cog=⚙, icon-search=🔍, icon-moon=🌙, icon-sun=☀️, icon-folder=📁, icon-home=🏠, icon-menu=☰, icon-star=★), PLUS raw inline emojis: 🌙/☀️ (theme toggle — in common.js applyTheme + updateNavThemeItem + index/setup/watch.html headers), 🔄 (rescan — main.js + index.html), ▲/▼ (folder reorder — setup.html), ▶ (play). APPROACH: re-implement the .icon-* classes as CSS mask-image (SVG, self-hosted) + background-color: currentColor + inline-block sizing, so the existing `<i class='icon-*'>` markup mostly stays and icons inherit theme text color automatically. Bundle the needed Material Symbols Outlined SVGs (home, folder, settings, search, dark_mode, light_mode, menu, play_arrow, delete, refresh, keyboard_arrow_up, keyboard_arrow_down) into the repo (e.g. public/assets/icons/ or as data-URIs in CSS) with Apache-2.0 attribution. Replace the raw inline emojis (theme toggle, rescan, reorder) with .icon-* classes. KEEP the gold ★ rating stars as-is (they're a rating display, not chrome — gold-specific, not theme-colored). Icons must: render in all 8 theme combos (currentColor), align with adjacent text, size consistently, and not break any existing icon usage. Additive/no functional change. Significant two-reviewer QA (all-combos rendering, no missing/broken icon, offline/no-CDN, alignment/sizing).

history.note: Principal-engineer design complete for icon-assets. Appended '## Technical Design' to docs/exec-plans/active/icon-assets.md and set artifacts.design. Approach: re-implement the .icon-* classes (minus icon-star) as CSS mask-image over 12 self-hosted Material Symbols Outlined SVGs bundled under public/assets/icons/ + background-color:currentColor, so the SVG acts as an alpha mask and the icon paints in the theme text color (themes across all 8 era x mode combos with zero per-theme rules, inheriting the existing .sidebar-item i / .bottom-nav-item i / .btn currentColor chain). Specified: exact 12-file asset list + GitHub raw source URL template (Apache-2.0) + public/assets/icons/README.md mirroring public/fonts/README.md; the full base .icon-* rule (display:inline-block, width/height:1em em-relative sizing, vertical-align:-0.15em, background-color:currentColor, both mask-* and -webkit-mask-* for Safari/iOS) enumerated explicitly (NOT [class^=icon-] wildcard) so icon-star can never be swept into the mask/currentColor system + per-icon mask-image URLs; icon-star kept verbatim as content:'★' (gold, out of scope, contamination risk flagged). JS: single-line applyTheme change (common.js:62) from emoji innerHTML to '<i class=icon-sun/moon>' fragment; updateNavThemeItem (line 285) already sets icon.className so no change; resolveTheme/initTheme/toggleTheme/setTheme/FOUC untouched. Raw-emoji edits enumerated: theme-toggle 🌙 x3 pages, hamburger ☰ x3 pages, rescan 🔄 (index.html:100 + main.js 213/222/228 switched from textContent to innerHTML, text kept), reorder ▲/▼ (setup.html:185/187) with inline font-size:10px -> 16px sizing fix so the em-sized mask renders sensibly. Sizing/alignment: em-driven off each context's font-size (sidebar 16px, bottom-nav 20px, theme-toggle 18px, menu-toggle 20px), no new width overrides required (optional .bottom-nav-item i 22px if QA wants larger). Alternatives considered: inline <svg> (rejected - breaks class contract, mass markup rewrite), data-URI masks (rejected - unreviewable diffs, diverges from fonts/ precedent), Material Symbols web font (rejected - CDN/offline violation). Tests: only CI-checkable are assets-served-200, no-CDN grep=0, no-stray-chrome-emoji grep, lint; rest is manual 8-combo x 3-page visual + offline reload. Build order documented (fetch SVGs -> attribution -> CSS -> applyTheme -> raw-emoji+reorder sizing -> verify -> manual). No data-model/API/route changes; no perf-budget impact. Ready to route to engineering-manager for task breakdown.

Product-manager discovery complete for icon-assets. Wrote exec plan to docs/exec-plans/active/icon-assets.md, grounded in the real code: enumerated all 10 .icon-* CSS classes (style.css:1327-1337) and every current consumer across index.html/setup.html/watch.html/common.js/main.js/watch.js; enumerated the 7 raw inline-emoji sites (theme toggle x3 pages + 1 JS setter in applyTheme, rescan x1 page + 3 JS states in main.js, folder reorder x2 buttons in setup.html); confirmed the gold star rating system (watch.html .star spans, main.js .card-rating) is fully out of scope and untouched; confirmed public/fonts/README.md + Dockerfile COPY public/ ./public/ as the offline-bundling precedent (no Dockerfile change needed for new icon assets). Findings/decisions recorded in the plan's Decision log: (1) folded the previously-inconsistent hamburger #menu-toggle raw '☰' into the already-existing-but-unused icon-menu class; (2) confirmed icon-play/icon-search/icon-star have zero current <i> consumers -- bundled anyway for API completeness except icon-star which stays out of the mask-image system per the gold-star requirement; (3) added 3 new classes (icon-refresh, icon-arrow-up, icon-arrow-down) not in the original 10-class inventory since rescan/reorder glyphs had no existing slot. Full emoji-to-Material-Symbol mapping table included. Recommended delivery mechanism: CSS mask-image over self-hosted SVG files under public/assets/icons/ (not data-URIs) + background-color:currentColor, matching the public/fonts/ precedent; existing <i class=icon-x> markup keeps working unmodified except at the 8 explicitly-listed emoji/hamburger sites. Flagged a concrete design risk for the principal-engineer: setup.html's reorder buttons are currently sized via font-size:10px (works for text glyphs, breaks for mask-image icons) -- needs explicit width/height sizing decision. No conflicts with active exec plans (none currently active besides this one) or the tech-debt tracker. Testability noted as overwhelmingly manual/visual (8 theme-combo x all-pages checklist); CI can only confirm asset serving, no-CDN grep, and lint. QA note: requires significant two-reviewer pass per the feature's own requirement. Artifacts set: requirements and exec_plan both point to docs/exec-plans/active/icon-assets.md. Ready to route to principal-engineer for design.

Feature initiated via /kickoff. New feature icon-assets (Real Icon Assets, v1.6.0). BOOTSTRAP ONLY: no discovery/design content produced and no specialist agents invoked this turn. Before bootstrapping, finalized the prior shipped feature: the Mobile App Shell (mobile-app-shell) shipped as v1.5.0. Copied docs/exec-plans/active/mobile-app-shell.md to docs/exec-plans/completed/mobile-app-shell.md with a COMPLETED/Shipped-v1.5.0 tombstone header, acceptance criteria checked off, and a 'Shipped v1.5.0' Progress-log entry; also folded the QA fixes (Playlists sheet :not([hidden]), safe-area-inset-top, landscape nav hide, re-fetch on open, applyTheme sync) into the archived design so the record matches what shipped. This toolset cannot true-`mv`, so the active copy at docs/exec-plans/active/mobile-app-shell.md remains as a stale tombstone to be `git rm`'d by the main loop. Checked for overlapping active exec plans: none block this — the only file in docs/exec-plans/active/ is the mobile-app-shell tombstone (being retired) plus .gitkeep. Checked the tech-debt tracker (docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md): Active table empty; Closed #1 (unbounded transcode-cache, resolved by avi-ux-refinement) is unrelated to this icon/theming work. Tech-debt tracker left untouched. Overlap assessment: icon-assets touches the same .icon-* classes in public/css/style.css that mobile-app-shell (v1.5.0) and era-themes (v1.4.0) rely on — complementary, not conflicting. mobile-app-shell's bottom nav uses .icon-home/.icon-folder/.icon-moon/.icon-sun/.icon-cog and era-themes established the currentColor/token theming this feature leans into; re-implementing the emoji glyphs as mask-image + currentColor SVGs is an additive swap that must NOT break either consumer (all existing <i class='icon-*'> markup must keep working).

Bootstrapped and staged for discovery. Slug icon-assets, v1.6.0 additive UI feature replacing ALL emoji icons with self-hosted Google Material Symbols Outlined (Apache-2.0), bundled offline (no CDN, mirroring how the Roboto font is self-hosted), themed via currentColor so icons render correctly across all 8 era x mode theme combos. Description captured verbatim in state. CURRENT STATE (from the request): the icon system is entirely emoji — the .icon-* classes in public/css/style.css are `::before { content: '<emoji>' }` (icon-play, icon-delete, icon-cog, icon-search, icon-moon, icon-sun, icon-folder, icon-home, icon-menu, icon-star) PLUS raw inline emojis for the theme toggle (moon/sun in common.js applyTheme + updateNavThemeItem + the index/setup/watch.html headers), rescan (main.js + index.html), folder reorder up/down (setup.html), and play. APPROACH (from the request): re-implement the .icon-* classes as CSS mask-image over self-hosted SVGs + background-color: currentColor + inline-block sizing so the existing `<i class='icon-*'>` markup mostly stays and icons inherit theme text color automatically; bundle the needed Material Symbols Outlined SVGs (home, folder, settings, search, dark_mode, light_mode, menu, play_arrow, delete, refresh, keyboard_arrow_up, keyboard_arrow_down) into the repo (public/assets/icons/ or data-URIs) with Apache-2.0 attribution; replace the raw inline emojis with .icon-* classes. EXPLICIT KEEP: the gold star rating display stays as-is (it's a rating indicator, gold-specific, not theme-colored chrome). Constraints: icons must render in all 8 combos via currentColor, align with adjacent text, size consistently, break no existing icon usage; additive / no functional change. Significant two-reviewer QA required (all-combos rendering, no missing/broken icon, offline/no-CDN, alignment/sizing). Artifacts remain null (fresh feature — no requirements/design/exec_plan yet); the product-manager must ground the plan in the real code (public/css/style.css, public/js/common.js, public/js/main.js, public/*.html) rather than only this description, and confirm the exact current emoji inventory + every consumption site. Awaiting /prep-pm-discover to route the product-manager. BOOTSTRAP ONLY this turn.

Two-reviewer pass. QA agent APPROVE-WITH-NITS (flagged missing CI-checkable tests). Code-review workflow caught an a11y regression QA missed: icon-only header buttons lost accessible names. Fixed: aria-labels on menu-toggle + theme-toggle (x3 pages); @supports guard so no-mask-support degrades to blank not a square; squared the sidebar icon box; added CI tests (bundled SVGs / no-CDN / no-stray-emoji + served-200 integration). Kept dead icon-play/icon-search (pre-existing class API). 90 tests green.
